calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-11-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Rita Carranza, a/k/a Rita Valdivia Carranza.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

David V. Marcolini, Esq. appeared for plaintiff San Francisco Federal Credit Union.
William Cooper, Collections Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Rita Carranza, a/k/a Rita Valdivia Carranza.
Plaintiff's first amended complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on November 14, 2018, and personally served on defendant Rita Carranza, a/k/a Rita Valdivia Carranza, on December 19, 2018.
Default as to defendant Rita Carranza, a/k/a Rita Valdivia Carranza, was entered on March 18, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on March 18, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff San Francisco Federal Credit Union, and against the Defaulted Defendant Rita Carranza, a/k/a Rita Valdivia Carranza, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $190,995.37.
Prejudgment Interest - $27,662.29.
Attorney Fees - $3,600.00.
Costs - $530.00.

Total - $222,787.66.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2019 Continued To Aug-07-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2019 Continued To May-01-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
